titlestmt.titleproper: Department of Civil Engineering. Engineering-Economics Series Reports1978-1987: Finding Aid ENG004
titlestmt.author: Engineering Library Staff

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2026-07-24 12:58:11 -0400.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: English, Latin script.
profiledesc.descrules: Finding aid content adheres to that prescribed by Describing Archives: A Content Standard.

did.unittitle: Engineering Economics Series Reports

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Princeton University. Department of Civil and Environmental Engineering

did.abstract: Consists of technical and research reports created by the faculty and staff of the Department of Civil Engineering from 1978 to 1987. These reports are issued as part of the Economic Series.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Consists of technical reports from the Department of Civil Engineering.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The School of Engineering and Applied Science technical reports are in the circulating collection of the Lewis Science and Engineering Library on the B floor of the Fine Hall Wing. Email englib@princeton.edu for questions or digitization of materials upon request.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Single copies may be made for research purposes. To cite or publish quotations that fall within Fair Use, as defined under U. S. Copyright Law, no permission is required. For instances beyond Fair Use, it is the responsibility of the researcher to determine whether any permissions related to copyright, privacy, publicity, or any other rights are necessary for their intended use of the Library's materials, and to obtain all required permissions from any existing rights holders, if they have not already done so. Princeton University Library's Special Collections does not charge any permission or use fees for the publication of images of materials from our collections, nor does it require researchers to obtain its permission for said use. The department does request that its collections be properly cited and images credited. More detailed information can be found on the Copyright, Credit and Citations Guidelines page on our website. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us through the Ask Us! form.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Identification of specific item; Date (if known); Department of Civil Engineering Technical Reports, Engineering Library, Princeton University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Finding aid written by Engineering Library Staff in 2011
